event1.text: If we're going to survive, you need to know who we were.

event2.text: ECHO wasn't run by one person, no matter how much Hale liked that idea.

event4.text: At least, that's what the official manifest says.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
event0.caption: Recovered official ECHO crew manifest.

event1.text: Grant handled security. Head of Not Dying, he called himself.

event2.text: Rivera managed logistics. Park and Owens were stuck in the lower sectors.

event3.text: Nobody liked the lower sectors. Park pretended he did. Owens called him a liar every morning.

event1.text: Power, relay routing, pressure control, emergency doors. If something opened or closed, Hale probably had a way into it.

event2.text: That's why I don't like hearing his voice in places it shouldn't be.

event0.title: CREW PHOTO
event0.caption: Recovered ECHO crew photograph. Image analysis pending.

event0.text: I used to hate this photo.

event1.text: Grant blinked, Rivera refused to smile, and Hale looked ready to kill the photographer.

event0.text: Don't make me say it first.

event1.text: If I tell you what to see, you'll wonder if I planted the idea.

event4.text: Six bunks. Six suits. Six emergency tags.

choice1.text: DO YOU KNOW WHO IT IS?

event1.text: And I know how convenient that sounds.

event2.text: But if there was a seventh person on ECHO, someone worked very hard to make us forget them.

event1.title: MANIFEST_V2
event1.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
07 █████████
event1.caption: Recovered alternate manifest layer. Seventh entry redacted.

event0.text: I don't know who Number 7 is.

event1.text: One whisper from the dark and suddenly I'm the suspect.

event2.text: Fine. Keep that question. Just don't let it stop you from asking the right one.

event3.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE.
